unternehmen_name.label: Name des Unternehmens
unternehmen_name.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`).

unternehmen_strasse.label: Straße
unternehmen_strasse.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`).

unternehmen_hausnummer.label: Hausnummer
unternehmen_hausnummer.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`).

unternehmen_plz.label: Postleitzahl
unternehmen_plz.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`).

unternehmen_ort.label: Ort
unternehmen_ort.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`).

unternehmen_notiz.label: Notiz (optional)
unternehmen_notiz.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`).

schichtart_name.label: Name der Schichtart
schichtart_name.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`).

schichtart_beschreibung.label: Beschreibung
schichtart_beschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`).

schichtart_beginn.label: Beginn (Uhrzeit)
schichtart_beginn.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`).

schichtart_ende.label: Ende (Uhrzeit)

zuweisung_notiz.label: Notiz (optional)
zuweisung_notiz.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`).

zuweisung_beginn.label: Beginn (Uhrzeit)
zuweisung_beginn.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`).

zuweisung_ende.label: Ende (Uhrzeit)
zuweisung_ende.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`).

zuweisung_mitarbeiter.label: Mitarbeiter auswählen
zuweisung_mitarbeiter.description:
A reference to another LivingApp record from a target lookup app (or `null`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://<hostname>/rest/apps/<app-id>/records/<record-id>` or `null`.

zuweisung_datum.label: Datum der Schicht
zuweisung_datum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day. (Or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` or `null`.

For example: `1642-12-25`.

zuweisung_schichtart.label: Schichtart auswählen
zuweisung_schichtart.description:
A reference to another LivingApp record from a target lookup app (or `null`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://<hostname>/rest/apps/<app-id>/records/<record-id>` or `null`.

zuweisung_unternehmen.label: Unternehmen auswählen
zuweisung_unternehmen.description:
A reference to another LivingApp record from a target lookup app (or `null`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://<hostname>/rest/apps/<app-id>/records/<record-id>` or `null`.

mitarbeiter_vorname.label: Vorname
mitarbeiter_vorname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`).

mitarbeiter_telefon.label: Telefonnummer
mitarbeiter_telefon.description: A valid telephone number. Might include country prefix and should include area code (or `null`).

mitarbeiter_nachname.label: Nachname
mitarbeiter_nachname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`).
